services.title: Services Management
services.subtitle: Configure and manage healthcare services offered to patients.
services.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{serviceName}}? This action cannot be undone.
services.deleteWarningMessage: All associated form mappings and provider assignments will be removed.
services.formMappingInfo: After saving, you can map a specific intake form to this service in the Forms Configuration section.
services.errorLoadingServices: Error loading services. Please try again.
services.serviceDescriptionPlaceholder: Provide a brief description of the service...
services.mapFormInfo: Select the fields that should be included in the form for this service. The form will be available for providers when they deliver this service.
services.formActiveInfo: This form is currently active and being used by providers for this service.

serviceDescriptions.generic: General healthcare service for various medical needs.
serviceDescriptions.wound_care: Professional wound treatment, cleaning, and management services.
serviceDescriptions.nursing_care: Comprehensive nursing care provided by licensed healthcare professionals.
serviceDescriptions.physiotherapy: Physical therapy sessions to restore mobility and function.
serviceDescriptions.blood_test: Full metabolic panel and lipid profile blood analysis.
serviceDescriptions.injection: Safe administration of injections by qualified healthcare staff.
serviceDescriptions.vital_signs_monitoring: Regular monitoring of patient vital signs and health indicators.
serviceDescriptions.post_operative_care: Skilled nursing care for patients recovering from surgery.
serviceDescriptions.palliative_care: Comfort-focused care for patients with serious and chronic illnesses.
serviceDescriptions.home_care: Medical and personal care services provided in the patient's home.
serviceDescriptions.diagnostics: Diagnostic testing and health screening services.
serviceDescriptions.pharmacy: Pharmaceutical services, medication dispensing, and management.
serviceDescriptions.iv_therapy: Intravenous therapy and fluid administration services.
serviceDescriptions.catheter_care: Professional catheter insertion, maintenance, and care.
serviceDescriptions.wound_dressing: Specialized wound dressing and ongoing care services.
serviceDescriptions.blood_pressure_monitoring: Regular blood pressure monitoring and cardiovascular health management.
serviceDescriptions.diabetes_care: Comprehensive diabetes management, monitoring, and education.
serviceDescriptions.respiratory_care: Respiratory therapy and breathing support services.
serviceDescriptions.physical_therapy: In-home physical rehabilitation and exercise therapy sessions.
serviceDescriptions.occupational_therapy: Therapy to help patients regain ability to perform daily activities.
serviceDescriptions.speech_therapy: Speech and language therapy for communication disorders.
serviceDescriptions.elderly_care: Comprehensive health assessment and specialized care for elderly patients.
serviceDescriptions.maternity_care: Prenatal and postnatal care services for expectant mothers.
serviceDescriptions.pediatric_care: Specialized healthcare services for infants, children, and adolescents.
serviceDescriptions.mental_health: Mental health support, counseling, and therapeutic services.
serviceDescriptions.nutrition_counseling: Professional dietary assessment and nutritional guidance.
serviceDescriptions.pain_management: Comprehensive pain assessment, treatment, and management.
serviceDescriptions.hospice_care: End-of-life care focused on comfort, dignity, and quality of life.
serviceDescriptions.rehabilitation: Recovery and rehabilitation services for injured or ill patients.
serviceDescriptions.skilled_nursing: Advanced nursing care delivered by highly trained professionals.
serviceDescriptions.personal_care: Assistance with personal hygiene, grooming, and daily living activities.
serviceDescriptions.companion_care: Companionship, social engagement, and emotional support for patients.
serviceDescriptions.respite_care: Temporary relief care to support primary caregivers.
serviceDescriptions.medical_social_services: Social support, counseling, and care coordination services.
serviceDescriptions.home_health_aide: Assistance with health-related tasks and personal care at home.
serviceDescriptions.speech_language_pathology: Assessment and treatment of speech, language, and swallowing disorders.
serviceDescriptions.medical_equipment: Provision, delivery, and setup of essential medical equipment.
serviceDescriptions.medical_oxygen: Oxygen therapy and respiratory support delivered at home.
serviceDescriptions.artificial_nutrition: Nutritional support through feeding tubes or intravenous delivery.
serviceDescriptions.personal_hygiene_care: Assistance with bathing, grooming, and personal hygiene needs.
serviceDescriptions.pca_pain_management: Patient-controlled analgesia for effective pain management.
serviceDescriptions.pregnancy_related_care: Healthcare services supporting pregnancy, delivery, and postpartum.
serviceDescriptions.parenteral_nutrition_central_line: Complete nutrition delivered directly into the bloodstream.
serviceDescriptions.cno: Coordination of nursing operations and care management.
serviceDescriptions.hydration_infusion: Intravenous hydration therapy and electrolyte fluid replacement.
serviceDescriptions.antibiotherapy_infusion: Intravenous antibiotic therapy for treatment of infections.

forms.prescriptionsRelatedALD: Prescriptions related to the treatment of the recognized long-term condition (listed or not listed) (Exempting condition)
forms.toBeCarriedOutByNurse: To be carried out by a private/home care nurse at the patient's home, every day, including Sundays and public holidays:

forms.weeklyWeightMonitoring: Weekly monitoring of body weight with maintenance of a weight chart

forms.capillaryBloodGlucose: Capillary blood glucose monitoring and insulin injection
forms.removalSutures: Removal of sutures or staples in

forms.prescriptionsNotRelated: Prescriptions not related to the recognized long-term condition
forms.prescriptionsNotRelatedALD: Prescriptions not related to the recognized long-term condition (listed or unlisted) (INTERCURRENT ILLNESSES)
forms.prescriptionsRelatedTreatmentALD: Prescriptions related to the treatment of the recognized long-term condition (listed or unlisted) (EXEMPTING LONG-TERM CONDITION)
forms.certifyNursingCare2: , certify that his/her state of health requires nursing care at home.
forms.importantNotice: **This form must be accompanied by a handwritten secure prescription.
forms.pcaMorphineAdministration: To be carried out at home by a home care nurse (RN), every day, including Sundays and public holidays, for PCA morphine administration.
forms.preparationProgrammingPump: - Preparation and programming of a portable pump
forms.fillingSettingUpPump: - Filling and setting up the portable pump
forms.connectingInfusion: - Connecting the infusion and starting the device
forms.dressingChangeHuber: - Dressing change and replacement of the Huber needle once a week
forms.organizationMonitoring: - Organization of infusion monitoring, care planning, and, where applicable, coordination of 24-hour monitoring services, including Saturdays, Sundays, and public holidays
forms.administrationContinuousInfusion: Administration by continuous infusion PCA pump of:
forms.mlFlexibleBag: ml in a flexible bag with a maximum capacity of 50 ml
forms.maxBolusesPerHour: Maximum number of boluses per hour:
forms.timesPerWeekFor28Days: times per week for 28 days for administration by continuous infusion PCA pump of injectable morphine hydrochloride.
forms.compressedOxygenCylinder: compressed oxygen cylinder with pressure regulator and appropriate flowmeter*
forms.humidifierCompliant: Humidifier compliant with NF EN ISO 8185 standard:
forms.backupSource: - Backup source: compressed oxygen cylinder with pressure regulator and appropriate flowmeter
forms.mobilitySource: - Mobility source: 1 small compressed oxygen cylinder with pressure regulator and appropriate flowmeter
forms.nonKinkingTubing: - Non-kinking star-lumen oxygen tubing if possible
forms.adjustOxygenSpO2: Adjust oxygen to obtain an SpO₂ ≥
forms.prescriberPhoneNumber: Prescriber's phone number to call if contact is necessary:
forms.crossOutItemsThatDoNotApply: * Cross out any items that do not apply
forms.followInstructionsCarefully: It is essential to follow the instructions carefully.
forms.useOxygenDaily: Use your oxygen daily for at least the duration indicated on your prescription.
forms.oxygenExplosionWarning: If oxygen comes into contact with a flame or combustible material, there is a risk of explosion, fire, and/or serious burns.
forms.neverSmokeVape: smoke or vape while using oxygen.
forms.neverSmokeRoom: smoke in the room where your oxygen is installed.
forms.neverAerosol: use aerosol sprays or flammable solvents near oxygen (alcohol, gasoline, etc.).
forms.neverGreasyOintment: apply greasy ointment to the face and never handle the equipment with greasy hands.
forms.neverHeatSources: keep the equipment near heat sources.
forms.homeOxygenPalliativeCare: HOME OXYGEN THERAPY AS PART OF PALLIATIVE CARE yes or no (box)
forms.ambulatoryDuringTreatment: The patient must remain ambulatory during treatment?:
forms.supervisionBox: If filled/prepared under the supervision of a healthcare facility, tick this box

forms.infusedAlone: If this treatment must be infused ALONE, tick this box

auth.loginDescription: Welcome back. Please enter your credentials to access the healthcare dashboard.
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your administrative email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Create a strong, unique password to secure your administrative access.
auth.passwordUpdatedDescription: Your administrative credentials have been successfully updated. You can now use your new password to sign in.
auth.securityNotice: Secure administrative portal. All activities are logged and monitored for HIPAA compliance. Unauthorized access is strictly prohibited.
auth.changePasswordDescription: Enter your current password and set a new one.
auth.passwordsDoNotMatch: New password and confirm password do not match
auth.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters long
auth.resetInstructionsDesc: Password reset instructions have been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password.
auth.failedSendReset: Failed to send reset instructions. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordSecurityNotice: Security Notice: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a reset link shortly. Please check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive within 5 minutes.
auth.hipaaResetNotice: All password reset requests are logged and audited for HIPAA compliance.
